tasks.task_goal: Brew a clean pour-over coffee by separating grounds from the brew
tasks.expected_outcome: Clear, sediment-free coffee drips into the mug while grounds remain in the filter
required_tool_attributes: microporous cellulose fibers with pores smaller than coffee grounds
conical shape to seat in dripper and promote directed flow
wet strength to resist tearing in hot water
edge sealing against dripper walls to prevent bypass
unconventional_tools: High-strength paper towel folded into a cone
Empty disposable paper tea filter bag lined in the dripper
Stacked paper cupcake liners pressed into a cone

tasks.task_goal: Clarify used frying oil by removing burnt crumbs and batter bits
tasks.original_tool: fine-mesh metal sieve lined with paper towel
tasks.expected_outcome: Clean oil flows into the container while food particles are trapped in the liner
required_tool_attributes: heat-resistant metal mesh to support the liner
absorbent, porous paper with smaller pores than crumbs
rigid rim and handle to hold steady over a pot
sufficient open area to maintain oil flow rate
unconventional_tools: stainless-steel splatter screen lined with a coffee filter or paper towel
folding metal steamer basket lined with paper towel or brown paper, set over the pot
stainless-steel canning funnel lined with a paper coffee filter

tasks.task_goal: Make Greek yogurt by straining whey from plain yogurt
tasks.expected_outcome: Thickened yogurt remains in the cloth while whey drains into the bowl
required_tool_attributes: woven cotton with micron-scale pores to retain milk solids
food-safe and non-reactive material
high tensile strength when wet
flexible fabric to form a hanging pouch for drainage
unconventional_tools: Clean, pre-washed cotton pillowcase
Pre-washed 100% cotton T-shirt (used as a straining cloth)
Stacked paper coffee filters placed in a colander

tasks.task_goal: Sift flour to remove lumps and aerate before baking
tasks.expected_outcome: Uniform, lump-free flour falls into the mixing bowl; larger clumps are retained
required_tool_attributes: fine stainless-steel mesh with uniform aperture
rigid frame to keep mesh taut
agitation mechanism to drive particles through
food-safe construction
unconventional_tools: stainless-steel splatter screen (for frying)
reusable stainless-steel pour-over coffee filter cone
large stainless-steel tea infuser basket

tasks.task_goal: Brew loose-leaf tea without leaves escaping into the cup
tasks.expected_outcome: Tea liquor flows into the cup while leaves are confined in the basket
required_tool_attributes: fine perforated or mesh walls small enough to retain tea fragments
heat-resistant stainless steel
secure lid or closure to prevent leaf escape
rigid basket to maintain shape in hot water
unconventional_tools: reusable stainless steel K-Cup coffee filter pod (snap-lid mesh)
stainless steel powdered sugar dredger/shaker with fine-mesh cap (screw-top)
stainless steel herb/spice infuser tube (screw-top perforated canister)

tasks.task_goal: Remove dried skin and debris from latex paint before spraying
tasks.expected_outcome: Smooth, debris-free paint collects in the sprayer cup, reducing nozzle clogs
required_tool_attributes: solvent-resistant nylon mesh
fine pores sized to catch paint skins and nibs
cone shape to fit paint cans and funnels
strong seams to withstand flow
unconventional_tools: Reusable nylon pour-over coffee filter cone
Nylon pantyhose or knee-high stocking stretched over a funnel or can rim
Nylon nut-milk strainer bag

tasks.task_goal: Filter rust flakes from gasoline while refueling a generator
tasks.original_tool: funnel with built-in fine mesh screen
tasks.expected_outcome: Clean fuel reaches the tank while particulates are trapped by the screen
required_tool_attributes: gasoline-resistant plastic or metal construction
fine stainless-steel mesh at the outlet
rigid funnel geometry for controlled flow
secure fit to receiving tank to prevent spills and bypass
unconventional_tools: Reusable stainless-steel pour-over coffee dripper (mesh cone) used as a straining funnel
Cut HDPE motor-oil jug used as a makeshift funnel with a stainless kitchen splatter screen clipped over the spout
Stainless-steel tea infuser basket seated in the filler neck and paired with a rigid metal funnel

tasks.task_goal: Keep an HVAC system clean by trapping dust in return air
tasks.expected_outcome: Dust and lint accumulate in the filter while clean air circulates through the ducts
required_tool_attributes: fibrous porous media with rated pore size
pleated design for high surface area
stiff frame and gasket to eliminate bypass
structural integrity under airflow and pressure
unconventional_tools: HEPA vacuum cleaner bag (cut-to-fit filter media)
Automotive cabin air filter (pleated cartridge)
Pleated paper coffee filters (stacked in a frame)

tasks.task_goal: Improve office air quality by capturing fine particulates and pollen
tasks.expected_outcome: Air exiting the purifier has significantly fewer fine particles and allergens
required_tool_attributes: submicron fibrous media (HEPA-rated)
pleated area to reduce pressure drop
sealed edges within the cartridge to prevent bypass
compatibility with a fan to draw air through
unconventional_tools: MERV 13–16 HVAC furnace filter taped to a box fan (Corsi-Rosenthal style)
HEPA-rated vacuum cleaner bag used as an intake filter on a fan
Automotive cabin air filter (HEPA type) mounted over a fan or blower intake

tasks.task_goal: Make stream water potable on a backpacking trip
tasks.original_tool: pump water filter with hollow-fiber cartridge
tasks.expected_outcome: Clear water free of sediment, protozoa, and bacteria fills the bottle
required_tool_attributes: hollow-fiber membrane with 0.2–0.3 µm pores
hand pump to create pressure differential
backflushable design to restore flow
impact-resistant housing and seals
unconventional_tools: Large irrigation syringe (60–100 mL) paired with a 0.22 µm disposable syringe filter
Aeropress coffee maker using a 0.2 µm lab membrane disc instead of the paper filter
Hand-pump garden sprayer bottle plumbed through a 0.2 µm sterilizing-grade inline capsule filter

tasks.task_goal: Keep leaves and debris out of a rain barrel during collection
tasks.expected_outcome: Rainwater passes into the barrel while leaves and insects are blocked on top
required_tool_attributes: coarse mesh sized to retain leaves and twigs
UV- and weather-resistant material
rigid ring or frame to sit on the barrel opening
easy-to-clean surface
unconventional_tools: frying pan splatter screen
aluminum pizza screen (perforated pizza pan)
spare window screen frame

tasks.task_goal: Clear cloudy aquarium water by removing suspended solids
tasks.original_tool: aquarium canister filter with mechanical filter pad
tasks.expected_outcome: Aquarium water becomes visibly clearer as particles are trapped in the pad
required_tool_attributes: porous foam or floss with graded porosity
sealed canister forcing all water through media
aquarium-safe materials
pump-driven flow through the filter
unconventional_tools: Clean nylon pantyhose stuffed with polyester pillow stuffing (polyfill) secured over the intake of a small tabletop fountain pump
2-liter PET soda bottle packed with polyester pillow stuffing used as a DIY sealed canister, driven by a small submersible fountain pump
Drip coffee cone with paper filter fed by a small fountain pump to push aquarium water through the paper media

tasks.task_goal: Restore swimming pool clarity by trapping fine debris
tasks.expected_outcome: Pool water runs clear as fine particulates are captured in the sand bed
required_tool_attributes: graded silica bed forming tortuous pore paths
pressure-rated tank to contain flow
underdrain laterals for even collection
multiport valve for backwashing
unconventional_tools: under-sink water filter housing with a refillable cartridge packed with fine pool sand
large aquarium canister filter loaded with pool filter sand instead of ceramic media
polyester pillow stuffing placed in a fine-mesh laundry bag and used as a skimmer/return sock

tasks.task_goal: Collect a precipitate from a reaction mixture in a chemistry lab
tasks.original_tool: Buchner funnel with filter paper and vacuum flask
tasks.expected_outcome: Solid precipitate remains on the paper while filtrate is pulled into the flask
required_tool_attributes: filter paper with specified retention rating
perforated support plate to distribute suction
vacuum-tight seal between funnel and flask
chemical-resistant glass/ceramic components
unconventional_tools: Ceramic pour-over coffee dripper with paper coffee filter
Aeropress coffee maker (paper disk filter and plunger seal)
Stovetop moka pot filter basket and gasket assembly used with paper filter

tasks.task_goal: Separate soil into size fractions for particle-size analysis
tasks.expected_outcome: Soil fractions are sorted by mesh size into separate sieves and a pan
required_tool_attributes: wire meshes with standardized aperture sizes
rigid frames to maintain mesh geometry
mechanical agitation to promote passage
lid and catch pan to contain sample
unconventional_tools: Nested kitchen sieves/colanders and splatter screens over a baking sheet catch pan with a pot lid on top, vibrated by holding a handheld orbital sander against the stack

Embroidery hoops stretched with different meshes (window screen, hardware cloth, chiffon) stacked over a roasting pan with a baking tray as catch pan and lid, agitated using a massage gun against the frame
A salad spinner holding stacked mesh strainers inside its basket; the spinner provides mechanical agitation while the outer bowl serves as the catch pan and a plate works as a lid

tasks.task_goal: Remove wax cappings and bee parts from raw honey
tasks.expected_outcome: Clean honey flows into the bucket while coarse and fine debris are retained
required_tool_attributes: nested coarse and fine stainless meshes
food-grade metal resistant to warm viscous honey
hooked rim to sit securely on a bucket
large open area to maintain flow
unconventional_tools: Stainless-steel colander nested over a fine-mesh splatter screen laid across the bucket rim
Perforated stainless-steel steamer insert resting on the bucket with a stainless-steel chinois (conical strainer) underneath for finer filtering
Stainless-steel deep-fryer basket hooked on the bucket edge with a fine-mesh drum sieve (baker's tamis) positioned below

tasks.task_goal: Reuse leftover UV resin by removing cured flakes before pouring back into the bottle
tasks.expected_outcome: Filtered resin passes cleanly into the bottle without solid contaminants
required_tool_attributes: UV- and solvent-resistant nylon mesh (190–220 µm)
conical form that nests in a funnel/bottle neck
support ring to maintain the opening
fine pores to capture cured resin bits
unconventional_tools: Nylon pantyhose stretched over a funnel and secured with a rubber band
Reusable nylon pour-over coffee filter cone
Fine-mesh nylon nut milk bag clipped over a funnel

tasks.task_goal: Prepare compost tea for a sprayer by removing solid particles
tasks.expected_outcome: Particle-free liquid fills the sprayer tank, reducing nozzle clogging
required_tool_attributes: fine porous nylon fabric
drawstring or closure to prevent solids escape
tear-resistant material when wet
high permeability to maintain flow
unconventional_tools: nylon pantyhose or knee-high stockings (tied off as a makeshift filter)
mesh laundry delicates bag with drawstring
organza drawstring gift/favor bag (sheer fabric)

tasks.task_goal: Keep hop matter out of wort before fermentation
tasks.original_tool: hop spider (nylon mesh bag with frame)
tasks.expected_outcome: Wort drains clear of hop particles while hops remain captured in the mesh
required_tool_attributes: heat-resistant mesh (300–400 µm) to retain hop material
rigid frame to suspend bag in kettle or fermenter
seams and closure that prevent bypass
sufficient open area for rapid wort flow
unconventional_tools: stainless steel splatter screen (pan grease guard) rolled into a cylinder and clipped to the kettle rim
large stainless steel tea infuser basket with locking lid
stainless steel cold-brew coffee mesh infuser (mason jar insert)

tasks.task_goal: Remove large gravel from paydirt before fine gold panning
tasks.expected_outcome: Oversize rocks are retained while finer material suitable for panning passes into the bucket
required_tool_attributes: rigid mesh of known aperture size
sturdy plastic frame that nests on a bucket
high open area for fast throughput
abrasion resistance for rough aggregates
unconventional_tools: baking cooling rack (1/4-inch grid)
deep-fryer basket
frying pan splatter screen
